---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a node, capability or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**The problem**

What are you trying to build or automate that Metis cannot do today?

**The shape of a solution**

A node type, a builder capability, an Operate lever - whatever you imagine.

**Alternatives you considered**

Workarounds you tried (Code node, HTTP node, external glue).
